# CWE-204 positive: different HTTP bodies reveal account state (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-204-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-204 Observable Response Discrepancy
// Vulnerable line: distinct messages for unknown vs wrong password.
func AuthenticateUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, accounts map[string]string) {
	login := r.FormValue("login")
	secret := r.FormValue("secret")
	stored, ok := accounts[login]
	if !ok {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNotFound)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "no account"})
		return
	}
	if stored != secret {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "bad secret"})
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
}
